<ANS>
```python
import numpy as np
import pandas as pd
from sklearn.preprocessing import StandardScaler


class TabRegressionTargetScaler:
    def __init__(self):
        self.scalers = {}
        self.nan_values = {}

    def fit(self, df):
        for col in df.columns:
            # Handle NaN values
            self.nan_values[col] = df[col].isna()
            df[col] = df[col].fillna(df[col].median())

            # Fit StandardScaler
            self.scalers[col] = StandardScaler()
            self.scalers[col].fit(df[[col]])

    def transform(self, df):
        for col in df.columns:
            df[col] = self.scalers[col].transform(df[[col]])
        return df

    def inverse_transform(self, df):
        for col in df.columns:
            # Inverse Standard scaling
            df[col] = self.scalers[col].inverse_transform(df[[col]])

            # Re-introduce NaN values
            if len(df[col]) == len(self.nan_values[col]):
                df[col] = df[col].where(~self.nan_values[col], np.nan)
        return df
```
</ANS>
